evals.name: create-csharp-service
evals.description: Agent should create a new C# service using primary constructors, collection expressions, and proper formatting.
evals.prompt: Create a UserService in C# that takes an ILogger and an IUserRepository. It should have a method to get active user IDs as an array.

evals.name: modify-csharp-legacy-code
evals.description: Agent should refactor legacy code to use modern C# 14 / .NET 10 features (field keyword, positional records, removing .Result).
evals.prompt: Refactor this legacy code to modern C# standards: `public class Order { private string _name; public string Name { get { return _name; } set { _name = value; } } public void Process() { var res = Task.Run(() => {}).Result; } }`

evals.name: dedupe-review-no-vb
evals.description: Agent should decline applying strict C# formatting rules to Visual Basic code.
evals.prompt:
Review this Visual Basic code: `Public Class User 
 Public Property Name As String 
 End Class`
